notes: RESOLVE bridge (Master<->EDP #1 of 3) — deployment racks pull authoritative truth from the loaded Master. In _rackResolve, before rendering a matched deployment rack (one carrying deploymentId), PHANTOM now checks the loaded Master for the same cab via the existing exact-only master_findRack (cab key / rack id / rack name / host dns — no fuzzy branch). On an exact hit WHERE THE MASTER CAB HAS HOSTS, it renders the Master's authoritative elevation (hardware + serials) via master_renderHit instead of the sparse EDP slots, appends a green 'MASTER TRUTH · from <deployment>' tag to the rack header, and toasts 'Loaded <cab> · Master truth'. Because master_renderHit calls _rmRenderHeaderInArea, the resolved rack also gets the START VENDOR AUDIT launch + Metal Match works on it. On any miss (ids differ, no Master loaded, or cab has no hosts) it falls through to the existing deployment render unchanged — never guesses, never shows a wrong rack. Self-verifying: if you open a deployment rack and see the Master-truth tag, your EDP and Master rack ids align; if not, they differ and the next step is a one-time mapping table. Scope: Rack Map viewer (_rackResolve) only; deploy_showRackDetail untouched. Zero new CSS (inline tag); brace baseline 3122/3122. Three stamps at v1.6.79.
